description_long: This object is a sleek, black firearm with a long cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel, giving it an elongated profile. The main body features a streamlined design with a prominent trigger guard and a pistol-style grip, which appears ergonomic and slightly textured for better handling. The suppressor is nearly as long as the main body, suggesting a focus on noise reduction and stealth. The receiver and slide are smooth, with minimal external features, and the ejection port is subtly integrated. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. The overall finish is matte black, with a consistent, hard metallic appearance throughout.
description: A black firearm with a long suppressor, pistol grip, and a smooth, matte finish. The design is streamlined and modern, with a rounded trigger guard and minimal external features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the firearm, including the long suppressor, pistol grip, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular end of the suppressor and the narrow profile of the grip and body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the suppressor, grip, and trigger guard, with minimal external markings.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the length of the suppressor, with the barrel's end visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical suppressor attached, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized, smooth with no finger grooves or reinforcement
